2603.25226.title: WebTestBench: Evaluating Computer-Use Agents towards End-to-End Automated Web Testing
2603.25226.paper_summary: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has catalyzed a paradigm shift in programming, giving rise to "vibe coding", where users can build complete projects and even control computers using natural language instructions. This paradigm has driven automated webpage development, but it introduces a new requirement about how to automatically verify whether the web functionalities are reliably implemented. Existing works struggle to adapt, relying on static visual similarity or predefined checklists that constrain their utility in open-ended environments. Furthermore, they overlook a vital aspect of software quality, namely latent logical constraints. To address these gaps, we introduce WebTestBench, a benchmark for evaluating end-to-end automated web testing. WebTestBench encompasses comprehensive dimensions across diverse web application categories. We decompose the testing process into two cascaded sub-tasks, checklist generation and defect detection, and propose WebTester, a baseline framework for this task. Evaluating popular LLMs with WebTester reveals severe challenges, including insufficient test completeness, detection bottlenecks, and long-horizon interaction unreliability. These findings expose a substantial gap between current computer-use agent capabilities and industrial-grade deployment demands. We hope that WebTestBench provides valuable insights and guidance for advancing end-to-end automated web testing. Our dataset and code are available at https://github.com/friedrichor/WebTestBench.
2603.25226.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的出現催化了一場程式設計的範式轉變，產生了「氛圍編碼」，用戶可以使用自然語言指令建立完整的專案，甚至控制電腦。這一範式推動了自動化網頁開發，但它引入了一個新的要求，即如何自動驗證網頁功能是否可靠地實現。現有的研究在適應上面臨困難，依賴靜態視覺相似性或預定的檢查清單，這限制了它們在開放式環境中的效用。此外，它們忽略了軟體質量的一個重要方面，即潛在的邏輯約束。為了解決這些問題，我們引入了WebTestBench，這是一個用於評估端到端自動化網頁測試的基準。WebTestBench涵蓋了各種網頁應用類別的全面維度。我們將測試過程分解為兩個連鎖的子任務，檢查清單生成和缺陷檢測，並提出了WebTester，這是一個針對此任務的基準框架。使用WebTester評估流行的LLMs顯示出嚴重挑戰，包括測試完整性不足、檢測瓶頸和長期互動不可靠等問題。這些發現揭示了當前計算機使用代理能力與工業級部署需求之間的重大差距。我們希望WebTestBench能為推進端到端自動化網頁測試提供有價值的見解和指導。我們的數據集和代碼可在https://github.com/friedrichor/WebTestBench獲得。
2603.25226.author: Fanheng Kong et.al.
2603.25226.authors: Fanheng Kong, Jingyuan Zhang, Yang Yue, Chenxi Sun, Yang Tian, Shi Feng, Xiaocui Yang, Daling Wang, Yu Tian, Jun Du, Wenchong Zeng, Han Li, Kun Gai
